Coach-Mining
and The Enrollment
Extractor™ Workbook
MODULE 2: LESSON 8
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 10 --

-1-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Listen to and/or transcribe 3-5 enrollment or strategy calls.
If you don’t have an existing bank of calls to draw from, you can offer a
series of complimentary coaching or strategy sessions around the problem
your product solves.
This can be done even if you don’t offer 1-on-1 consulting or coaching as a
product.
To get participants on these calls, you can:
1. Send an email to your list, or…
2. Create a facebook post (on personal page / in your group / group
you’re a part of with permission)
3. Host an AMA on fb live (in your group or someone else’s)... and per-
sonally follow up with commenters who showed deeper engagement.
Coach-Mining Process:
Coach-Mining Question Bank:
Note: you don’t need to ask all of these -- and definitely not in the sequence
provided. This is simply a bank of Q’s for you to draw from. It’s important to
stay natural and fluid in your conversations, while still leading the conversa-
tion with a basic structure.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 10 --

1. What specifically is happening in your life right now that made you take
this call?
2. Can you tell me more about how it felt the last time (problem)
happened?
3. What have you been actively doing to overcome (x) or achieve (y). How’s
that been working out? Why do you think that is?
4. Out of all the places you could’ve turned to to solve (problem), why do you
want MY help? Why now?
5. I’m humbled by the opportunity to help you today -- and the commitment
you’ve made to overcoming (problem). Just so I’m aware -- what was the
tipping point or catalyst that led to that decision?
NOTES:
-2-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
Section 1 - To Discover the Moment of Highest
Tension (and subcutaneous wound)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 10 --

6. If we’re having this conversation X months/years in the future. Looking
back, what must have happened personally/professionally/financially for
you to say it’s been the best year (and decision) of your life? (Credit: Dan
Sullivan /Strategic Coach)
7. If you could wave a magic wand over X part of your life - what would that
look like?
8. What do you want to be most proud of?
9. If you literally couldn’t fail (while pursuing X)... what would your life look
like X months/years from now?
10. Who would you be most excited to share that win with?
11. Who in your life would benefit most from you achieving (x outcome)?
12. What’s your favorite drink / meal / place in the world? If we were sitting
across from each other (clinking that drink / at that place in the world) in X
months from now… what would you be toasting to?
a. A tangible/surface level result?
b. An internal/emotional result?
c. Fulfillment/Pride around achieving the result
13. Who did you have to become in order for that (new reality) to happen?
What shifts did you make to get there?
NOTES:
Section 2 - To Discover the Moment of Highest Pleasure
10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-3-
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 10 --

10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-4-
1. Why haven’t you achieved what you want to achieve?
2 .How long have you been actively pursuing (x outcome)? Why’s it been
taking so long?
3. What do you believe the people who have (achieved X) or (overcome Y)
have that you don’t? What do you think made them successful? What makes
them special?
4. Why do you think *that’s* happening? (as an immediate follow up Q when
they tell you their problem)
5. Acknowledging and accepting that many people in your exact situation
have gone on to (overcome X) or (achieve y)... why do you believe you’ve yet
to join them in that success?
6. What do you think OTHERS have had to overcome to get (desirable out-
come)?
7. What positive (and even scary) shifts do you think OTHERS had to make to
get that (desirable outcome)? Can you see yourself making those same
shifts?
NOTES:
Section 3 - To Discover Sacred Cows /
Engineer New Beliefs
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 10 --

-5-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
After you’ve uncovered the MOHT and MOHP it’s time to start building the
bridge between the two:
1. What would it take for us to start moving towards (MOHP) together?
2. If we were to end this call right now, do you feel you’d be able to confi-
dently and efficiently (move towards MOHP) on your own? Would you make
it? Why or why not?
3. What concerns you most about your path towards (MOHP)?
4. Acknowledging that (MOHP) is possible… and that many others have suc-
ceeded in achieving it… what do you personally need right now to start
taking powerful strides with in that direction?
NOTES:
Section 4 - The Bridge Over Troubled Water
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 10 --

10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-6-
Aside from another Simon & Garfunkel reference, this set of questions is
designed to start placing yourself as the mentor that helps them cross that
bridge -- and deeply seeing/feeling how crossing it will be more effective/en-
joyable with you in their corner.
1. If I were to guide you every step of the way, would you feel safe commit-
ting to (MOHP) today?
2. Are you willing to accept my help to get you there?
3. How can I help you right now, in this moment to start moving towards
(MOHP)?
4. How much faster do you think you’ll achieve MOHP if we worked on it
together?
NOTES:
Section 5 - The Mrs. Robinsonwww.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 10 --

-7-	10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018
1. What do you feel you’ve experienced in the past that makes you READY to
get results working with me?
2. In what ways do you feel like your previous setbacks have prepared you
for this moment?
3. What part of our possible work together excites you the most?
4. What part of our possible work together scares you the most?
NOTES:
Section 6 - For the “Perfect For You If” Close &
Sources of Exclusive Empowerment
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 10 --

1. What do you know for CERTAIN will happen if nothing were to change
here today?
2. What do you feel is at stake if nothing changes?
3. Knowing that staying where you are is a choice -- do you feel comfortable
making it? … why or why not?
4. When you really tune in… does the excitement of pursuing (x outcome)
with me outweigh the risk/discomfort/fear of staying where you are?
NOTES:
Section 7 - For Risk Mitigator
10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-8-
Section 8 - For Upgraded FAQ Close
(after you’ve made an offer)
1. What questions do you have before moving forward together?
2. Do you have any questions about partnering together to (generate
MOHP)?
NOTES:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 10 --

Transformation and insight often occurs during a moment of prolonged
silence.
Silence can be seen as an internal 404 error where your client’s previous
beliefs/attitudes/experiences no longer compute with a newly proposed
reality or sense of possibility.
Learn to be COMFORTABLE with that silence -- and allow it to simmer for as
long as necessary.
Give your client/coachee the gift of the rich insight and “aha” moment that
can only be formed and take hold within that space.
If you’re getting your calls transcribed -- ask the transcriptionist to clearly
mark SILENCE.
If you’re re-listening to your calls - PAUSE when you hear silence - and note:
1. What happened to cause that pause?
2. What question preceded that silence?
3. What do you think is going on in your prospect/coachee’s head
during that silence? If you could were to script their inner dialogue,
what would it be:
4. What is the “aha” moment or insight that just shifted for them?
What belief was dissolved in that silence? What new belief or sense of
possibility is filling up that vacuum?
Assignment: The Sound of Silence
10x Sales Pages Track 2: The Sales Page in a Day Method™ by Ry Schwartz & Copy Hackers © 2018 	-9-
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 10 --
